items.title: H. B. Fuller (FUL) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
items.description: H. B. Fuller (FUL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +7.27% and +0.01%, respectively, for the quarter ended May 2025. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
